title: Parse Structured Log Lines
description:
Each line of the input is a JSON object with at least `level` and `message` fields. Skip invalid JSON lines silently.

Return the `message` value of every ERROR-level entry, one message per line, in the order they appear.

Return an empty string if no ERROR lines are found.
constraints: Input is a plain string passed to solve(input string) string
Return a string matching the expected output exactly
Return empty string where the problem specifies no results

examples.explanation: See test case: Mixed log levels
